In a sauce pot, combine truffle oil and butter and heat until butter is melted, mixing with a whisk to prevent burning solids
Once butter is melted and slightly foamy, add other ingredients
Continue heating and mixing until smooth and homogenous, and entire sauce is warmed through
Mix the Potato Starch and Water into a slurry, and slowly add to the pot while whisking in
Cook ~5 minutes more or until thickened from starch activation
Ensure mixture is homogenous and evenly thickened.
Reserve to quart containers and cool in a blast chiller or ice bath
Store in the cooler
